title: triteleia scabra
intro: Triteleia scabra, also known as the rough or scabrous triteleia, is a perennial wildflower native to western North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of triteleia scabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of triteleia scabra typically involve drying and infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water to create a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
